deferred_cross_domain_behaviors.reason: User settings are stored through option.php but depend on current-user, auth, cookies, and capability behavior.
Theme mods are option-backed, but their public behavior belongs with themes/template loading rather than the first storage/cache slice.
Post, comment, term, and user meta cache invalidation should be verified with their domain query and mutation APIs.

first_fixture_targets.oracle_focus: Database storage, false/default contracts, serialization, alloptions/notoptions cache state, and autoload decisions

Default runtime cache mutations, group scoping, found-reference behavior, flush semantics, persistent drop-in compatibility, and bootstrap order

Settings registry globals, default option filters, sanitization callbacks, and REST-schema bridge boundaries
